upasargachandrika.example_text: 'aDa cet sarve'gnaya udvAyeyuH kiM vA tato BayamAgacCet' (go0 brA0 pU0 313) yasyAhavanIye'nudvAte (anudvAne ) gArhapatya udvAyet ukto'rTaH
'yasya nArASaMsa upavAyati' (paYca0 brA0 brA0 995) upavAyati upaSuzyati
